stemHtml: Prior to arriving at an airport after sunset, an ATIS reports calm surface winds, temperature -18°C, dew point -24°C, and a 15°C inversion at 300 ft above aerodrome level. What flight safety risk can be expected, based on that ATIS?

options.a: The possibility for a sudden reduction in visibility due to the blowing snow.
options.b: A sudden degradation of braking performance on the runway.
options.d: The altimeter will over-read the aerodrome elevation.
